channel.title: BreedWise Dog Breed Planning Guides
channel.description: Evidence-aware dog breed health-risk, ownership cost, and lifestyle fit guides.

item.title: Akita First-Time Owner Risk: When Experience Matters More Than Size
item.description: A practical Akita guide for owner experience, handling, socialization, and household fit.

item.title: Australian Cattle Dog Job Requirement: Budgeting for a Working Mind
item.description: Plan Australian Cattle Dog ownership around jobs, training, exercise, and mental workload.

item.title: Australian Shepherd Energy Mismatch: How to Know Before Adoption
item.description: A practical guide to Australian Shepherd exercise, training workload, and household fit before commitment.

item.title: Basenji Barkless Breed Reality: Quiet Does Not Mean Easy
item.description: A Basenji ownership guide covering noise myths, independence, secure space, and training workload.

item.title: Basset Hound Ear, Back, and Weight Costs: Low Dog, High Planning
item.description: A Basset Hound planning guide covering ears, weight, stairs, and recurring care.

item.title: Beagle Exercise in an Apartment: A Scent-First Plan for Busy Owners
item.description: A Beagle apartment exercise guide that combines scent games, barking management, and realistic owner schedules.

item.title: Bernese Mountain Dog Lifespan Planning: Budgeting With Eyes Open
item.description: A Bernese Mountain Dog planning guide for large-breed costs, shorter lifespan expectations, and source-aware ownership questions.

item.title: Bichon Frise Allergy and Grooming Budget: What Low-Shedding Really Costs
item.description: A Bichon Frise guide for grooming workload, allergy expectations, and recurring care costs.

item.title: Border Collie Mental Stimulation Budget: The Cost Most Owners Miss
item.description: Plan Border Collie enrichment costs with training time, work-like games, and boredom prevention.

item.title: Boxer Health Costs: Budgeting for an Energetic Breed Without Alarmism
item.description: A Boxer health-cost planning guide focused on energy, heart questions, breathing considerations, cancer awareness, training, and emergency reserves.

item.title: Cane Corso Housing Restrictions: Costs Before You Bring One Home
item.description: A Cane Corso planning article about housing rules, training, legal restrictions, and owner readiness.

item.title: Cavalier King Charles Health Costs: A Gentle Breed With Serious Planning Questions
item.description: A Cavalier King Charles Spaniel health-cost planning guide covering cardiac questions, records, dental care, grooming, and owner budget buffers.

item.title: Chihuahua Dental Cost Planning: The Small-Dog Expense Owners Forget
item.description: A Chihuahua dental planning article focused on preventive conversations, records, and recurring cost buffers.

item.title: Collie Grooming and Sensitivity Planning: Beauty, Brushing, and Calm
item.description: Plan Collie ownership around coat care, noise sensitivity, family routines, and cost exposure.

item.title: Corgi Back and Weight Planning: Small Dog, Serious Home Setup
item.description: Plan Corgi ownership around stairs, body condition, short-leg structure, and realistic cost exposure.

item.title: Dachshund Back Problems Cost: Home and Budget Planning Before Adoption
item.description: Prepare for Dachshund back-problem cost exposure with home setup questions, emergency reserves, body condition, and source-aware planning.

item.title: Dalmatian Urinary Health Questions: Planning Without Guesswork
item.description: A Dalmatian planning article about urinary-health questions, veterinary records, and owner routines.

item.title: Doberman Heart Screening Questions Future Owners Should Ask
item.description: A Doberman planning article about heart-screening records, breeder transparency, and budget buffers without medical advice.

item.title: English Bulldog Heat Risk Budget: Cooling Costs and Daily Limits
item.description: Plan English Bulldog ownership around heat, breathing questions, cooling routines, and realistic cost exposure.

item.title: First-Time Dog Owner Breed Questions That Prevent Expensive Surprises
item.description: A first-time dog owner breed checklist focused on lifestyle fit, health records, grooming, training, cost exposure, and source quality.
